'''Ryloon''' was [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in [[Velcar sector/Legends|Velcar sector]], [[Ryloon system/Legends|Ryloon system]]<ref name="Atlas" />and the site of several [[Imperial Remnant]] controlled orbital factories where captured prisoners were sent to work. The world remained part of the Remnant following its [[Pellaeon–Gavrisom Treaty|peace agreement]] with the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref>

==Appearances==
*[[Children of the Jedi (novel)|''Children of the Jedi'']] {{Mo}}
